releases.summary: Cosmetic and organizational release — visual polish and internal cleanup only, with no change to how the calculator, tax, shipping, or alerts behave.

items.body: The 16 / 48 / 128 px action icons are regenerated from the purple logo so the toolbar button and `chrome://extensions` card match the rest of the brand.
The estimated-total box and bid-calculator widgets are restyled, and the home page gains an amber tooltip.

Per-feature value sanitizers move next to the settings they guard, a shared tax-rate percent formatter is factored out, and GPL license headers are added — refactors that leave the extension's behavior identical.

releases.summary: Fixes the bid calculator's injection into eBay's redesigned Best-Offer "Make offer" lightbox.

items.body: eBay's redesigned "Make offer" lightbox now hydrates into a top-document `.bo-main-container` (a price-entry step followed by a cross-origin eBayPay review iframe) instead of the legacy `.app-siolayer-main-container` flow. The calculator targets the new price-entry step correctly again.

items.lead: Calculator no longer flickers in the offer modal.
items.body: The orange bid calculator is now seated above the stable message box; previously it was anchored beneath the price-input wrapper, which re-renders on every focus change and flashed the calc.
The legacy seller-initiated-offer path is kept as a fallback; the cross-origin review step is left to eBay's own total.

releases.summary: Initial standalone release — the landed-cost calculator and auction alerts, split into their own repo.

items.body: A dashed-purple box beside the price showing item + sales tax + shipping on listing, search, watchlist, bids/offers, and home pages.
A colored dot (🟢 free · 🟡 high on one count · 🔴 high on both · 📍🏃 pickup-only) flags shipping against your own thresholds.
On auctions and Best Offer listings, type a prospective bid (or an `=` formula) and see the live landed total — no `eval()`, back-solves a bid from a target total too.
A sound plus a system notification as an auction crosses your "seconds left" thresholds; click the alert to jump straight to the tab.
Expand any box for a live *@ $X.XX/unit* figure — divide a lot's total by a count, formulas included.
Multi-variation price ranges and non-US-currency listings both compute correctly from the US figures eBay shows.
Tune the tax rate, shipping-flag thresholds, per-page toggles, and auction alerts from the toolbar popup — every field takes effect on open eBay tabs live.
